option.name: originalContent
option.value:
import Image from 'next/image'; import { portfolioData, projects } from './portfolioData'; export default function Home() { return (

Home

{portfolioData.name}

{portfolioData.role}

{portfolioData.headline}

Projects

Ausgewaehlte Arbeiten

{projects.map((project) => (

{project.title}

{project.description}

Tech-Stack: {project.stack}

Github ansehen
Projekt ansehen
))}

about me

Profil

{portfolioData.about}

contact

Kontaktaufnahme

Telefon:{' '} {portfolioData.phone}

E-Mail:{' '} {portfolioData.email}

GitHub:{' '} {portfolioData.github}

); }

option.name: updatedContent
